---
title: "2 screens - howto limit mouse only to one ?"
date: 2005-11-02
forum: Hardware &amp; Laptops
---

### Post by Chareos on 2005-11-02
Hi everybody,

I managed to get 2 screens out of my nvidia 6600, a TV and my LCD.

Now, I'd love to limit mouse to the LCD monitor only (I don't want mouse to get to TV).

Is it possible ?


Thanks
Fabio



# /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
# values from the debconf database.
#
# Edit this file with caution, and see the /etc/X11/xorg.conf manual page.
# (Type "man /etc/X11/xorg.conf" at the shell prompt.)
#
# This file is automatically updated on xserver-xorg package upgrades *only*
# if it has not been modified since the last upgrade of the xserver-xorg
# package.
#
# If you have edited this file but would like it to be automatically updated
# again, run the following command:
# sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg

Section "Files"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/misc"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/cyrillic"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/100dpi/:unscaled"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi/:unscaled"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/Type1"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/CID"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/100dpi"
FontPath "/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi"
# paths to defoma fonts
FontPath "/var/lib/defoma/x-ttcidfont-conf.d/dirs/TrueType"
FontPath "/var/lib/defoma/x-ttcidfont-conf.d/dirs/CID"
EndSection

Section "Module"
# Load "GLcore"
# Load "i2c"
Load "bitmap"
Load "ddc"
Load "dbe"
# Load "dri"
Load "extmod"
Load "freetype"
Load "glx"
# Load "int10"
Load "type1"
# Load "vbe"
Load "v4l"
EndSection

Section "Extensions"
Option "RENDER" "on"
Option "Composite" "on"
EndSection

Section "ServerFlags"
Option "Xinerama" "false"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
Identifier "Generic Keyboard"
Driver "keyboard"
Option "CoreKeyboard"
Option "XkbRules" "xorg"
Option "XkbModel" "pc105"
Option "XkbLayout" "it"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
Identifier "Configured Mouse"
Driver "mouse"
Option "CorePointer"
Option "Device" "/dev/input/mice"
# Option "Protocol" "ImPS/2"
Option "Protocol" "Auto"
# Option "Emulate3Buttons" "true"
Option "Buttons" "6"
Option "ZAxisMapping" "5 6"
Option "Resolution" "800"
EndSection

Section "Device"
Identifier "GeForce 6600 LCD"
Driver "nvidia"
BusID "PCI:5:0:0"

screen 0

Option "RenderAccel" "TRUE"
Option "HWCursor" "TRUE"
Option "CursorShadow" "TRUE"
Option "CursorShadowXOffset" "2"
Option "CursorShadowYOffset" "2"

Option "AllowGLXWithComposite" "TRUE"

Option "ConnectedMonitor" "DFP"
#Option "UseEdidFreqs" "FALSE"
EndSection

Section "Device"

Identifier "GeForce 6600 TV"
Driver "nvidia"
BusID "PCI:5:0:0"

screen 1

#Option "XaaNoOffscreenPixmaps"

Option "RenderAccel" "TRUE"
Option "HWCursor" "TRUE"
Option "CursorShadow" "TRUE"
Option "CursorShadowXOffset" "2"
Option "CursorShadowYOffset" "2"

Option "AllowGLXWithComposite" "TRUE"

Option "ConnectedMonitor" "TV"
Option "IgnoreEdidFreqs" "TRUE"

Option "TVOutFormat" "SVIDEO"
Option "TVStandard" "PAL-B"
#Option "TVOverScan" "1.0"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
Identifier "LCD"
Option "DPMS"
DisplaySize 318 256
HorizSync 31.5-64.20
VertRefresh 61

# LCD 1280x1024 @ 61 Hz, 64.2 kHz hsync
Modeline "1280x1024_lcd" 110 1280 1328 1512 1712 1024 1025 1028 1054
Modeline "800x600_lcd" 38.95 800 832 976 1008 600 612 618 631
Modeline "640x480_lcd" 49.12 640 672 760 792 480 490 495 505 doublescan
EndSection

Section "Monitor"

Identifier "TV"
Option "DPMS" "FALSE"

#DisplaySize 660 370
DisplaySize 330 185

HorizSync 30-50
VertRefresh 60

#Modeline "640x360_tv" 35.05 640 672 736 768 360 367 371 379 doublescan
Modeline "1024x576@60" 45.81 1024 1056 1224 1256 576 587 593 605

# TV fullscreen mode or DVD fullscreen output.
# 768x576 @ 79 Hz, 50 kHz hsync

#ModeLine "768x576" 50.00 768 832 846 1000 576 590 595 630
# 768x576 @ 100 Hz, 61.6 kHz hsync
#ModeLine "768x576" 63.07 768 800 960 1024 576 578 590 616
EndSection

Section "Screen"
Identifier "Screen_LCD"
Device "GeForce 6600 LCD"
Monitor "LCD"
DefaultDepth 24
# SubSection "Display"
# Depth 16
# Modes "1280x1024" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
# EndSubSection
SubSection "Display"
Depth 24
Modes "1280x1024" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"
EndSubSection
EndSection

Section "Screen"
Identifier "Screen_TV"
Device "GeForce 6600 TV"
Monitor "TV"

DefaultDepth 24
Subsection "Display"
Depth 24
Modes "1024x576@60" "800x600"
EndSubsection
EndSection

Section "ServerLayout"
Identifier "Default Layout"
Screen 0 "Screen_LCD"
Screen 1 "Screen_TV" leftOf "Screen_LCD"
InputDevice "Generic Keyboard"
InputDevice "Configured Mouse"
EndSection

---

### Post by Chareos on 2006-05-16
Should I assume it's not possible ?

---
